name: Meringue Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and set aside.
2. In a medium bowl, beat egg whites with an electric mixer on medium speed until frothy. Add cream of tartar and salt, then continue beating on high speed until stiff peaks form. Gradually add sugar, one tablespoon at a time, while continuing to beat on high speed. Stir in vanilla extract and fold in chocolate chips.
3. Drop batter by heaping teaspoonfuls onto the prepared baking sheet. Place the baking sheet in the oven. Turn off the oven and allow cookies to sit undisturbed for 5 hours.
Variation: For a festive touch, add food coloring (green for Christmas, pink and yellow for Easter, etc.).
